title: Sidekick + SuperMail - automate email workflows in seconds

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is saving time on your 2026 to-do list?

Here’s how monday Sidekick combined with SuperMail can help:

Instead of spending time filtering email lists, customizing emails, and configuring tracking columns, let Sidekick do the heavy lifting.

Create the email, create the prompt, and let SuperMail and Sidekick do the rest.

See the process live (and learn how to set it up) here - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qMhBQ-J6yhk

sidekick thumbnail1600×900 209 KB

posts.author: Robin063Collins (Robin063Collins)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s a strong start—it reads like a promotional teaser. To make it sharper, you could tighten the close with a clear call‑to‑action. For example:
“Is saving time on your 2026 to‑do list? With monday Sidekick + SuperMail, you can skip the manual filtering and tracking—just craft your email and prompt, and let automation handle the rest. Watch the setup in action here and start streamlining today!”
